ksa_text: Establish and operate data and AI governance committees, including charter development, membership selection, decision authority definition, meeting cadence management, accountability structure design, and oversight operation.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-T-009 (LS, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4333 is insufficient to establish relevance to geospatial data analysis, GIS, and location intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.433, nist_ai_rmf=0.429, ddat=0.413) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4333 below threshold for weak fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does LS-domain KSA LS-T-009 (composite 0.4333) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4333 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Geospatial Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.4333 is not a standard requirement for Geospatial Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4333, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
